articles.title: Europe’s CoinShares announces the launch of XRP ETP
articles.description: Europe’s largest digital asset investment firm, Coinshares, is in the news today after it announced the launch of a novel Exchange Traded Product (ETP) under the name ‘Coinshares Physical XRP.’ The commodity will be listed under the ticker XRPL on the regulated SIX Swiss Exchange.
